required_transaction: load the complete Host fact graph at one committed Host revision
compare expected CompleteAgentHostRevision under a database lock
validate binding-to-source bidirectional uniqueness and positive generation
validate effect identity, payload digest, binding, source and generation
validate monotonic effect dispatch attempt and append-only archived inspection evidence
validate lease owner, token, epoch, generation and database-clock expiry
fence every external receipt or inspection against the current active lease owner, token, epoch, generation and expiry
settle revoke receipt and clear binding applied surface in the same Host transaction
atomically persist all changed Host facts and advance revision
return exact committed replay without a second write
required_constraints: Host revision is a singleton monotonic CAS token advanced only with the complete Host transaction
service instance identity is unique and immutable for a descriptor
offer references the exact service instance and profile digest
binding identity is unique and fixes service instance, source, generation, profile and surface
source coordinate is unique and references the same binding generation
effect identity is globally stable and fixes command, payload, binding, source and generation
receipt evidence is immutable; current-attempt latest inspection may only advance Unknown or Accepted to stronger evidence; terminal and same-state inspection evidence is immutable
explicit redispatch atomically archives prior-attempt NotApplied inspection evidence, clears current-attempt inspection, and advances dispatch attempt exactly once
archived inspection evidence is append-only and immutable by effect identity plus dispatch attempt
lease key is binding generation; owner/token/epoch fence stale workers
lease epoch never decreases and binding Lost invalidates the active lease
terminal revoke replay completes binding cleanup before returning the stored receipt

wire.final_state: revision 4 is the only generated and registered production revision

platform_deletions: RuntimeJournalFact and RuntimeJournalRecord Runtime/Host producers and readers
AgentRuntimeDriverContribution, AgentRuntimeDriverFactory and AgentRuntimeDriver Platform contracts
legacy Runtime Wire revision 3 generator and handlers
negative_gates: CompleteAgentHost has no Mutex/RwLock Host fact graph
production libraries expose no stateful repository or service-registry test adapter
Runtime projection remains owned by CompleteAgentStateRepository
Runtime repository does not create Host binding or source coordinates
production service registry contains only Complete Agent registrations
canonical generators include all frozen roots and only final Wire revision
legacy Platform journal, context activation and driver contract consumers are zero
dependency_order: Complete Agent Host -> Complete Agent Service API
Complete Agent adapters -> Complete Agent Service API
Infrastructure -> Runtime and Host repository ports
